---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Nestify
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Visual Studio 2022
2. Right-click on file(s) in Solution Explorer
3. Select '...'
4. Observe the unexpected behavior

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Visual Studio Version**: [e.g., 2022 17.12]
- **Nestify Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11]
- **Project Type**: [e.g., C# Console App, ASP.NET Core, etc.]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
